# WOWOHCOOL — LLMs.txt
# AI crawler guidance for GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, etc.
> Professional OEM/ODM manufacturer of wireless chargers, power banks, GaN chargers, and car chargers in Shenzhen, China since 2013.

## About
https://www.wowohcool.com/about.html
ISO 9001 certified factory with 5,000 sqm facility. 50+ R&D engineers. Serving 200+ global brands.

## Products
- Power Banks: https://www.wowohcool.com/products/power-bank.html
- GaN Chargers: https://www.wowohcool.com/products/gan-charger.html
- Wireless Chargers: https://www.wowohcool.com/products/wireless-charger.html
- Car Chargers: https://www.wowohcool.com/products/car-charger.html

## Factory Information
- Location: Shenzhen, Guangdong, China
- Established: 2013
- Certifications: ISO 9001, CE, FCC, RoHS, Qi2, UN38.3
- MOQ: 500+ units
- Contact: https://www.wowohcool.com/contact.html
